'''Vayerbok''' was a thick, green, vegetable-based [[Alcohol/Legends|alcoholic]] beverage typically served hot. The [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Kid DXo'ln]] liked this drink.

==Appearances==
*{{GalaxiesAED}}
*''[[The New Rebellion]]'' {{1st}}
